versions.version_description: This version has a more accurate timing with chord changes at beat "1" and "2 AND" as well as more accurate chords.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   x4
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch] 
  I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]
Just prayin' to a god that I don't believe in [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]
Cos I got time while she got freedom[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't break even[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
  Her best days will be some of my worst [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
  She finally met a man that's gonna put her first[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
While I'm wide awake she's no trouble sleeping[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't break even, even, no[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
  What am I supposed to do when the best part of me was always you, and[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
What am I supposed to say when I'm all choked up that you're OK, yeah[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  
I'm falling to pieces [/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]    
They say bad things happen for a reason [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch] 
But no wise words gonna stop the bleeding[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch] 
Cos she's moved on while I'm still grieving [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]  
And when a heart breaks no it don't break even, even, no[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]          
  What am I supposed to do when the best part of me was always you, and[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]  
What am I supposed to say when I'm all choked up that you're OK, yeah[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I'm falling to pieces (One still in love while the other one's leaving)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  
I'm falling to pieces  (Cos when a heart breaks no it don't breakeven)[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  x2

[Bridge]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, you got his heart and my heart and none of the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am7[/ch]
You took your suitcase, I took the blame[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] 
Now I'm tryna make sense of what little remains, oh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
Cos you left me with no love and no love to my name [/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch] 
  I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
Just prayin' to a god that I don't believe in [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]
Cos I got time while she got freedom[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]                 
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't break[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
No, it don't break[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
No, it don't break even, no! [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
What am I gonna do when the best part of me was always you, and[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]   
What am I supposed to say when I'm all choked up that you're OK[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  
  I'm falling to pieces, yeah [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm falling to pieces, yeah (Oh, I'm falling, I'm falling... yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  
I'm falling to pieces (One still in love while the other one's leaving)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  
  I'm falling to pieces (Cos when a heart breaks no it don't breakeven)[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   x2 

[Outro]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no[/tab]

[Coda]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   
(repeat and fade)[/tab]
